title: Automatic timeline move when moving items in group
excerpt:
Hello Monday Team! 
I have been trying to create an automation which allows me to add an item from one group to another and then automatically shift the date using the duration column + the end date of the item above it. …

posts.author: Nanadeee (Nana)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Monday Team!

I have been trying to create an automation which allows me to add an item from one group to another and then automatically shift the date using the duration column + the end date of the item above it.
